# duplocloud_aws_s3_table_namespace (Resource)

`duplocloud_aws_s3_table_namespace` manages an S3 table namespace in Duplo.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the S3 table namespace. Must be 1–255 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores, starting with a letter or number.
- `table_bucket_name` (String) The full name of the S3 table bucket in which to create the namespace.
- `tenant_id` (String) The GUID of the tenant that the S3 table namespace will be created in.

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the namespace was created.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `owner_account_id` (String) The AWS account ID of the namespace owner.

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Example: Importing an existing S3 table for an AWS resource
#  - *TENANT_ID* is the tenant GUID
#  - *S3_TABLE_NAME* The fullname of the s3 table.
#  - *NAMESPACE_NAME* The name of the s3 table namespace.
terraform import duplocloud_aws_s3_table.table *TENANT_ID*/*S3_TABLE_NAME*/*NAMESPACE_NAME*
```
